summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KPI Tracker application - both backend APIs and frontend UI are fully functional with excellent integration

minor_issues.issue: Accepts negative profit values without validation

passed_tests: Health endpoint returns correct status and period info
Today's entry creation and retrieval working
Spin addition working with proper data persistence
Daily stats calculation and retrieval accurate
Biweekly stats showing correct aggregated data
Period logs retrieval working (0 archived periods as expected)
Frontend loads successfully with all KPI cards
Modal functionality for adding bookings/spins/misc income
Data persistence across tab switches and page refreshes
Real-time UI updates after API calls
Status banner showing correct combined earnings progress

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (14/14 UI components and interactions tested successfully)
